name: fifa-cup-2026
description: FIFA Cup 2026 Tournament Tracker with real-time Firebase sync

scripts.watch: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const files = ['data.js', 'engine.jsx', 'components.jsx', 'bracket.jsx', 'app.jsx']; files.forEach(f => fs.watchFile(path.join(__dirname, f), () => { console.log('Rebuilding...'); require('./build.js'); }));"
